title: helenium autumnale
intro: Helenium autumnale, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helenium autumnale include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Helenium autumnale can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
